description: Parts of one whole, as a ring with a legend beside it. Identity only — a slice is a category by definition, so there is no tone. Dependency-free SVG with a visually-hidden table of the same numbers.

labels.description: One label per slice, in the same order as `values`. A label with no value at its index is dropped.

values.description: The parts, which are read as shares of their own total. A negative value floors at zero; a total of zero paints nothing.

seriesLabel.description: Names the chart for the accessible name, the table caption and its value column. Absent falls back to the chart type alone.

slots.description: Per-slice identity override, one ramp slot each. Absent assigns 1..N in order, which is the rule rather than a starting point.

valueSuffix.description: Appended verbatim to every number the chart draws — the legend value and the accessible table. Not the centre label, which is a percentage rather than a value.
